comment: Love this cordless drill! Battery lasts all day and the torque is impressive.
This paint is garbage and whoever designed it should be fired
I will find you at the store and make you regret selling me this junk
Does this deck stain work on pressure-treated lumber?
Meh, the tile cutter is okay. Not great, not terrible.
The staff are useless and ugly -- never going back to this Zava location
I respectfully disagree with the 5-star ratings -- the sander vibrates too much.
LOL Zava sells overpriced junk, are they even trying???
The plumbing section has everything I needed for my bathroom remodel. Great selection!
Anyone who buys this ladder is a complete moron
The online product descriptions could use more detail on dimensions.
Why does Zava even sell this brand? Total waste of shelf space.
The SmartHome hub won't pair with my existing light switches -- getting error code E14.
Zava employees are the worst people on earth
Not my first choice for kitchen cabinets, but the price is fair for the quality.
